title: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Steady As Inflation Risks Temper Growth Optimism
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: US stock futures are steady, with S&P 500 up slightly, as inflation concerns balance growth optimism. Today's market shows minimal changes.
